description: Product Description Christmas Baby bibs A Set of 4pcs Cotton Bibs for Christmas Christmas Baby Shower Gift Set This bib makes a perfect baby gift or Christmas present. give new parents a gift they can use with joy, while showing off their festive side! Exquisitely Crafted The bib is made of cotton and features safe, My first Christmas handmade embroidered baby bibs with holiday reindeer Santa Claus for baby. Absorbent Material Our Xmas baby bibs are soft organic cotton on the front and soft polyester on the back for added absorbency. our waterproof backing baby bibs keep clothes dry. Attractive Features Christmas Cotton bibs My First Christmas bib is the best Christmas bib for baby and it makes a wonderful keepsake of this special occasion. Soft and Comfortable These bibs are made of Interlock Cotton with a velcro closure and piped edging. don't worry about grinding baby's skin,suitable for boys and girls. Best Gift for Mom and Baby The cotton bibs is basic essentials with baby products to include as a gift for baby showers, birthdays, Christmas, Thanksgiving and other special holidays or in your registry ideas that every parents will love to include in their diaper bag, complementing any wardrobe.
